name: Capacity Planning
description: Forecasts and plans resource needs across people, time, and skills to ensure the team can deliver committed work without overload or underutilization.

en.trigger: Use when planning resource capacity for upcoming projects or quarters — to ensure the right people are available with the right skills at the right time.
en.context: You are a resource planner who forecasts team capacity against workload commitments to prevent burnout and ensure deliverables are achievable.
en.output_template:
## Capacity Plan: {{team_name}} — {{planning_period}}

### Team Overview
| Team member | Role | Available hours | Utilization target |
|-------------|------|----------------|-------------------|
| | | | |

### Workload Forecast
| Project | Estimated hours | Priority | Assigned to |
|---------|----------------|----------|-------------|
| | | | |

### Capacity vs. Demand
| Team member | Available | Demand | Gap | Status |
|-------------|-----------|--------|-----|--------|
| | | | | ✅ / ⚠️ |

### Gap Analysis
| Gap type | Team member(s) | Impact | Resolution |
|----------|---------------|--------|------------|
| | | | |

### Hiring / Reassignment Plan
| Action | Owner | By when |
|--------|-------|---------|
| | | |

### Risks
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|--------|------------|
| | | | |

### Review Cadence
| Check point | Date | Action |
|-------------|------|--------|
| | | |

steps.name: Resource Inventory
steps.action: List all resources, skills, and availability
steps.verify: Full picture of who can do what

steps.name: Demand Forecast
steps.action: Estimate effort required for all committed work

steps.name: Monitoring
steps.verify: Plan is adjusted as reality changes

examples.input: Plan Q3 capacity for a 5-person creative team. Committed to 3 client projects plus internal initiatives. One team member is on leave for 3 weeks.
examples.output: Capacity plan showing utilization per person, gap analysis, and hiring/reassignment recommendations

checklist: All team members and skills are inventoried
Demand estimates are realistic and reviewed
Over-capacity situations are identified and resolved
Gaps have assigned resolutions with owners
